name: Light Pill #13 - The Fate Spinner
description: The Fate Spinner - A glowing capsule that reveals the threads of destiny and teaches the art of weaving possible futures. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Patterned silk that shows interconnected threads of light
Loom that weaves with strands of potential futures
Silk slippers that never touch the ground
Celestial workshop where constellations are woven
Every choice you make unravels one future while weaving another into being.

You must weave three threads on the celestial loom - one of what might be, one of what should be, and one of what must never be. The pattern that emerges will show you the consequences of tomorrow's choices.
Must be taken at a crossroads or decision point

properties.ai_prompt: Celestial fashion editorial of The Fate Spinner in a workshop where constellations are woven, wearing patterned silk that glows with interconnected threads of light, working at a loom that weaves with strands of potential futures. Silver Thread aura with Weaving Motion energy, silk slippers floating above ground, cinematic lighting that shows the intricate patterns of fate being created, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible destiny threads and cosmic weaving patterns.
